fr.name: Esclave de sang de la Camarilla
fr.card_text:
Compagnon avec 1 point de vie.
Ce vampire reçoit +1 capacité. Durant sa phase de maître, il peut choisir une Discipline qu'il a au niveau inférieur et recevoir +1 niveau de la Discipline choisie jusqu'à sa prochaine phase de maître.

es.name: Esclavo de Vitae de la Camarilla
es.card_text:
Criado con 1 de vida.
El empleador obtiene +1 de capacidad. Durante su fase heril, puede elegir una Disciplina de nivel básico que posea y obtener el nivel superior de dicha Disciplina hasta su próxima fase heril.

card_text:
Retainer with 1 life.
This vampire gets +1 capacity. During their master phase, they can choose a Discipline they have at inferior and get +1 level of the chosen Discipline until their next master phase.

rulings.text: Is neither a Ghoul nor a mortal, it has no subtype. [ANK 20230308]
The vampire keeps his chosen Discipline at superior until his controller's next unlock phase even if the retainer is burned or stolen. [LSJ 19970224]

name: Camarilla Vitae Slave

card_text:
Unique wraith with 1 life.
This Giovanni gets +1 stealth when hunting. If a minion controlled by your prey would be burned, instead remove that burning minion from the game and put 1 soul counter on Charigger. This Giovanni gets +1 bleed for each soul counter on Charigger.

rulings.text: His replacement effect triggers before effects depending on the minion burning (eg. {Soul Gem of Etrius}), but other replacements effect can be played before (eg. {Heaven's Gate}), depending on sequencing. [LSJ 20071003-2] [ANK 20230816]

name: Charigger, The Axe

fr.name: Charnas le diablotin
fr.card_text:
Démon unique avec 1 point de vie.
Mettez Charnas sur n'importe quel serviteur (ceci est une action Ⓓ à +1 en discrétion si le serviteur ciblé est contrôlé par un autre Mathusalem). Charnas inflige 1 point de dégâts à son employeur durant sa phase de redressement. Charnas est immunisé aux dégâts de son employeur. Si son employeur est sur le point d'être brûlé, son contrôleur peut mettre Charnas sur n'importe quel autre serviteur.

es.name: Charnas, el Diablillo
es.card_text:
Demonio único con 1 de vida.
Pon a Charnas en cualquier siervo (ésta es una acción Ⓓ con +1 de sigilo si el siervo objetivo está controlado por otro Matusalén). Charnas inflige 1 de daño al empleador durante su fase de enderezamiento. Charnas es inmune al daño procedente del empleador. Si el empleador está a punto de ser quemado, su controlador puede poner a Charnas en cualquier siervo.

card_text:
Unique demon with 1 life.
Put Charnas on a minion (this is a +1 stealth Ⓓ action if the target minion is controlled by another Methuselah). Charnas inflicts 1 damage on the employer during their unlock phase. Charnas is immune to damage from the employer. If the employer is about to be burned, their controller can put Charnas on another minion.

rulings.text: Cannot be damaged by host, but does not stop host from using effects which would normally damage it. [RTR 19941109]
Is not burned if the controller of the vampire it is on is ousted: it is removed from the game. [ANK 20180408]
Immune means damage is not inflicted, even if non-preventable or outside combat. [LSJ 20010627] [LSJ 20010629] [LSJ 20090304-1]

The option to place the card on another minion can only be used when playing the card normally; for any other action or put into play effect, the card is placed on the playing minion. [LSJ 20090824] [LSJ 20051121]
rulings.group: Retainers and equipment put on different minion

rulings.text: The type of the action (equip/employ) does not change regardless of the target. [ANK 20230408] [LSJ 20050313]
rulings.group: Retainers and equipment put on different minion

name: Charnas the Imp

card_text:
Changeling with 1 life.
This Malkavian gets +1 bleed.
name: Childling Muse

card_text:
Ghoul with 1 life.
[vic] If the employer blocks a directed action, they get 1 optional maneuver during the first round of the resulting combat.
[VIC] As above, and the employer gets +1 intercept during directed actions.

rulings.text: The discipline level used to recruit it decides which version it is (inferior or superior). This does not change once it is in play. [RTR 19941109] [ANK 20180612]
Ghouls are monsters, not mortal. [ANK 20200203-2] [LSJ 20060515]

name: Corpse Balloon

card_text:
Ghoul with 1 life.
Vampire with this retainer may burn X blood to get +X intercept for the current action.
flavor_text:
You who all things spurn
And wound, when death shall come,
Even the wolves will scorn
Your cadaver, starved and numb.
Paul Verlaine, "Grotesques"

rulings.text: May be used any number of times during a single action. [TOM 19960109]
Ghouls are monsters, not mortal. [ANK 20200203-2] [LSJ 20060515]

name: Corpse Minion

card_text:
Unique mortal with 3 life. Requires an Anarch.
If this Anarch is blocked, they can burn 1 life from this retainer before block resolution to lock the blocking minion and continue the action as if unblocked. This retainer inflicts 1R damage on the opposing minion each round of combat during normal strike resolution.

rulings.text: If used to cancel combat, the blocking minion is still locked. [LSJ 20080611] [ANK 20210131]
If used to cancel combat, reactions cards pertaining to that combat (eg. {Obedience}) cannot be used afterwards. [ANK 20210131]

Damage is inflicted even against a dodge. A "strike: combat ends" ends combat before damage is applied, as will a combattant going to torpor during first strike. [RTR 19941109] [TOM 19951216] [PIB 20140324] [ANK 20200422]
Does not gain additional strikes from its owner. [RTR 19941109]
If the action continues "as if unblocked", all action modifiers and reaction cards are still in effect, even those pertaining to a successful block. [RTR 19941109] [ANK 20190116]
If the action continues "as if unblocked", any Methuselahs that have declined to block before do not get another opportunity to block. [ANK 20190116]

For actions resulting from an action card, "continue as if unblocked" moves the action card from the ash heap (where it went when the action was blocked) to limbo (where it should be if the action is not blocked). If the action card is not in the ash heap, then the action cannot be continued. [LSJ 20070808-1]

name: Crypt's Sons

card_text:
Ghoul with 2 life.
This Baali gets +1 bleed.
flavor_text:
The ghouls are used as both researchers and subjects. They are also essential for certain rites that require something other than blood but cannot be left to the uninitiated.
Azaneal, Baali

rulings.text: Ghouls are monsters, not mortal. [ANK 20200203-2] [LSJ 20060515]

name: D'habi Revenant

card_text:
Animal with 1 life.
Minions in combat with the employer cannot strike: combat ends.

rulings.text: If put on a minion after an opponent as declared a "strike: combat ends" (eg. using {Pack Alpha} or {Summon Spirit Beast}), the opponent's strike has no effect. [ANK 20190412]
Is neither a mortal nor a monster. [ANK 20200203-2] [LSJ 20060515]

name: Dog Pack

card_text:
Animal with 2 life.
[ani] This retainer inflicts 1 damage on the opposing minion each round of combat during normal strike resolution at close range.
[ANI] As above, and the employer gets 1 optional press each combat.

rulings.text: The damage is environmental, the retainer is the damage source. Immunity to retainer or retainer type works against it. [ANK 20180612] [ANK 20211127]

Damage is inflicted even against a dodge. A "strike: combat ends" ends combat before damage is applied, as will a combattant going to torpor during first strike. [RTR 19941109] [TOM 19951216] [PIB 20140324] [ANK 20200422]

name: Dread Mastiff

card_text:
Animal with 2 life.
During strike resolution, if the range is close, this retainer burns a weapon controlled by the opposing minion or inflicts 1 damage on the opposing minion.

rulings.text: The damage is environmental, the retainer is the damage source. Immunity to retainer or retainer type works against it. [ANK 20180612] [ANK 20211127]

Damage is inflicted even against a dodge. A "strike: combat ends" ends combat before damage is applied, as will a combattant going to torpor during first strike. [RTR 19941109] [TOM 19951216] [PIB 20140324] [ANK 20200422]
Is neither a mortal nor a monster. [ANK 20200203-2] [LSJ 20060515]
Does not gain additional strikes from its owner. [RTR 19941109]

name: Duma Rafiki

card_text:
Animal with 3 life. Requires a ready Laibon.
When this minion is in combat with an acting minion, the acting minion takes 2 damage during strike resolution each round if the range is close. A minion can have only one Elephant Guardian.
flavor_text:
The one who follows an elephant will have no problems.
Ghana proverb

rulings.text: The damage is environmental, the retainer is the damage source. Immunity to retainer or retainer type works against it. [ANK 20180612] [ANK 20211127]

Damage is inflicted even against a dodge. A "strike: combat ends" ends combat before damage is applied, as will a combattant going to torpor during first strike. [RTR 19941109] [TOM 19951216] [PIB 20140324] [ANK 20200422]
Is neither a mortal nor a monster. [ANK 20200203-2] [LSJ 20060515]
Does not gain additional strikes from its owner. [RTR 19941109]

name: Elephant Guardian

card_text:
Mortal with 1 life.
If the vampire with this retainer is in torpor, he or she gains 1 blood at the beginning of his or her minion phase.
flavor_text:
Like a child to her mother I have flown to you.
Sappho
name: Faithful Servant

card_text:
Animal with 1 life.
[ani] If the action to employ this retainer is successful, unlock this vampire during the next discard phase. You can lock this retainer to give the employer +1 intercept.
[ANI] As above, but unlock this vampire after resolution of this action instead.

rulings.text: The discipline level used to recruit it decides which version it is (inferior or superior). This does not change once it is in play. [RTR 19941109] [ANK 20180612]
Is neither a mortal nor a monster. [ANK 20200203-2] [LSJ 20060515]

name: Feral Hound

card_text:
Mortal with 1 life.
During your minion phase, you may look at one card picked at random from your prey's hand.
flavor_text:
Women excel in the manifestation of certain qualities which are associated with mystery...
Charles Godfrey Leland, "Gypsy Sorcery and Fortune Telling"
name: Fortune Teller

card_text:
Ghoul with 4 life. Requires a ready vampire.
When this vampire is blocked, he or she may burn this retainer and unlock instead of entering combat. (This does not unlock the blocker.)

rulings.text: Cannot be used if blocked when leaving torpor, as no combat would happen. [ANK 20181122-1]
Ghouls are monsters, not mortal. [ANK 20200203-2] [LSJ 20060515]

name: Ghoul Escort

card_text:
Ghoul with 1 life. Requires a ready Laibon.
The vampire with this retainer may move it to another ready vampire as a +1 stealth action. If the action is successful, the new employer gains 1 blood from the blood bank, and the acting vampire unlocks at the end of the turn. If the action is blocked, cancel combat, burn the Messenger, and do not lock the blocking minion.

rulings.text: Ghouls are monsters, not mortal. [ANK 20200203-2] [LSJ 20060515]

name: Ghoul Messenger

card_text:
Ghoul with 2 life. 1 strength.
During the initial strike resolution each round, the Ghoul Retainer inflicts 1 damage or may use a weapon not used by the employing minion (or another retainer) that round (either before or after). This is not a strike, although it does count as "using" the weapon.

rulings.text: The 1 Damage is not inflicted at long range. [ANK 20210929]
The Ghoul is not the bearer of the weapon, the employer is (eg. using {Garrote} does not allow the bearer to burn the opponent, {Zip Gun}'s damage go to the employer). [TOM 19951114] [LSJ 20080210]

The Ghoul uses weapon as if making the strike, including all side-effects (eg. {Zip Gun}'s damage, {Weighted Walking Stick} tokens), and is not limited to damage dealing strikes (eg. {Rowan Ring} sends to torpor, {Flash Grenade} ends combat). It is not a strike and cannot provide a maneuver, press or additional strike to the employer (eg. {Meat Hook}). [LSJ 20080210]
The Ghoul cannot play ammo cards (not even with a {Magazine}), although it can benefit from ammo cards played by the employer in an earlier round (eg. {Scattershot}). [LSJ 20080210]
The damage is environmental, the retainer is the damage source. Immunity to retainer or retainer type works against it. [ANK 20180612] [ANK 20211127]

Damage is inflicted even against a dodge. A "strike: combat ends" ends combat before damage is applied, as will a combattant going to torpor during first strike. [RTR 19941109] [TOM 19951216] [PIB 20140324] [ANK 20200422]
Ghouls are monsters, not mortal. [ANK 20200203-2] [LSJ 20060515]

name: Ghoul Retainer

card_text:
Unique mortal with 1 life.
This vampire gets +1 stealth during actions requiring Necromancy [nec].
flavor_text:
I've longed to dig myself a good deep grave
There to stretch my old bones at ease...
Charles Baudelaire, "The Gladly Dead"
name: Giuseppe, Gravedigger

card_text:
Retainer with 1 life.
[pro][ser] The employer can prevent 1 damage each combat. Hatch the Viper inflicts 1 damage on the opposing minion each round of combat during normal strike resolution at close range.
[PRO][SER] As above, but it inflicts 2 damage.

rulings.text: The damage is environmental, the retainer is the damage source. Immunity to retainer or retainer type works against it. [ANK 20180612] [ANK 20211127]

Damage is inflicted even against a dodge. A "strike: combat ends" ends combat before damage is applied, as will a combattant going to torpor during first strike. [RTR 19941109] [TOM 19951216] [PIB 20140324] [ANK 20200422]
The discipline level used to recruit it decides which version it is (inferior or superior). This does not change once it is in play. [RTR 19941109] [ANK 20180612]
Does not gain additional strikes from its owner. [RTR 19941109]

name: Hatch the Viper

fr.name: Homoncule
fr.card_text:
Compagnon avec 1 point de vie.
[pro] Durant la phase de redressement de n'importe quel Mathusalem, ce vampire peut brûler 1 point de sang pour se redresser.
[PRO] Comme ci-dessus, mais ce compagnon a 2 points de vie.
fr.flavor_text:
Un tas d'os dans un sac de peau, un ballon dégonflé ; un paquet ignoble.
Ronald Chetwynd-Hayes, "En quête de quelque chose à sucer"

es.name: Homúnculo
es.card_text:
Criado con 1 de vida.
[pro] Durante la fase de enderezamiento de cualquier Matusalén, este vampiro puede quemar 1 de sangre para enderezarse.
[PRO] Como antes, pero el /Homúnculo/ tiene 2 de vida.
es.flavor_text:
Un montón de huesos en un saco de piel, un globo desinflado; un bulto horrible.
R. Chetwynd-Hayes, "Buscando algo que chupar"

card_text:
Retainer with 1 life.
[pro] During any Methuselah's unlock phase, the employer can burn 1 blood to unlock.
[PRO] As above, but Homunculus has 2 life.
flavor_text:
A pile of bones in a skin bag, a deflated balloon; a hideous bundle.
R. Chetwynd-Hayes, "Looking For Something To Suck"

rulings.text: The discipline level used to recruit it decides which version it is (inferior or superior). This does not change once it is in play. [RTR 19941109] [ANK 20180612]

name: Homunculus

card_text:
Animal with 1 life. Requires a Laibon.
Put Ilomba on any minion (this is a +1 stealth Ⓓ action if that minion is controlled by another Methuselah). If Ilomba would burn a life (or would otherwise be burned), this minion burns a blood or life instead. If he or she cannot, he or she is burned. A minion may have only one Ilomba.

rulings.text: His effect applies to each point of damage. (eg. if 3 damage is done to him, the minion it is on burns 3). [ANK 20180525]
If damage is done simultaneously to Ilomba and its owner, the controller chooses the order of resolution. [LSJ 20090617-2]
Is neither a mortal nor a monster. [ANK 20200203-2] [LSJ 20060515]

The option to place the card on another minion can only be used when playing the card normally; for any other action or put into play effect, the card is placed on the playing minion. [LSJ 20090824] [LSJ 20051121]
rulings.group: Retainers and equipment put on different minion

rulings.text: The type of the action (equip/employ) does not change regardless of the target. [ANK 20230408] [LSJ 20050313]
rulings.group: Retainers and equipment put on different minion

name: Ilomba

card_text:
Demon with 2 life.
[tha] The vampire with this retainer can play a card that requires a Discipline he or she does not have as if he or she had the basic level of that Discipline; if he or she does so, place an investment counter on the Infernal Familiar. If the number of investment counters on the Familiar is greater than this vampire's capacity, burn this vampire.

rulings.text: No counter is added if the vampire uses another game effect (eg. {Ian Forestal}, another {Infernal Familiar}) to play a card that requires a Discipline they do not have. [RTR 20020501] [LSJ 20100517]
A counter is added if the card is canceled as it is played (eg. {Direct Intervention}). [LSJ 20000424]
Can be used to meet one (but not more than one) of the normal Discipline requirements of a multi-Discipline card. [LSJ 20011217] [LSJ 20090508]
While a minion has an effect that allows them to play cards that require Discipline(s), they do not actually have those Discipline(s). [LSJ 19980303]

Multiple similar effects (e.g. two {Infernal Familiar}, or {Ian Forestal} with an {Infernal Familiar}) cannot be used to meet the requirements of a multi-Discipline card that the minion is missing one or more Disciplines to play. [LSJ 20020218]

While using their ability to meet a discipline requirement, they also meet that requirement for any other cards associated with the original effect (e.g. meeting the [ani] requirement for {Pack Alpha} or {Muricia's Call} also meets the [ani] requirement for the {Raven Spy} employed by that effect). [LSJ 20080205-2] [LSJ 20060417]

name: Infernal Familiar

fr.card_text:
Mortel unique avec 1 point de vie.
Son employeur reçoit +1 en morsure.

Animal avec 1 point de vie.
[ani] Ce compagnon inflige 1 point de dégâts à toute portée au serviteur opposé durant chaque round de combat durant la résolution des frappes normales.

Dispersez-vous, ralliez-vous !

Animal con 1 de vida.

Y en el fondo del hoyo y de la fosa,
¡dispersaos!, ¡uníos!
Arthur Rimbaud, "Los cuervos"

Animal with 1 life.
[ani] Murder of Crows inflicts 1R damage on the opposing minion each round of combat during normal strike resolution.

In cold and gray and mournful weather
Scatter, hover, dive together!
Arthur Rimbaud, "Crows"

card_text:
Unique wraith with 1 life.
While this vampire is in combat, you get +2 hand size, and the opposing minion is considered the acting minion.

rulings.text: If burned in combat, her effect ceases immediately and the acting minion returns to normal for the rest of the combat. [ANK 20211022]
Supersedes previous effects that changed the acting minion for the combat (eg. {Deep Song}). [ANK 20211022]
If combat ends and a new combat start (eg. [CEL] {Psyche!}), the opponent redraws and discard again. [LSJ 20030530]

name: Nar-Sheptha

card_text:
Unique ghoul with 1 life.
The employer can burn 1 blood to set the range for the round before range is determined during the first round of combat.

rulings.text: Ghouls are monsters, not mortal. [ANK 20200203-2] [LSJ 20060515]

Once the range is set, no other effect can be used to reset the range that round, but other pre-range effects can be played afterwards. Skip the Determine Range step for that round. [RTR 19970630] [ANK 20180720]
If another effect was already setting that round's range (e.g. {Neutral Guard}), that effect has priority. [PIB 20120214]

name: Omael Kuman

Animal with 1 life.
[ani] While the employer is in combat, the opposing minion's controller plays with an open hand.

card_text:
Gargoyle creature with 2 life.
The Gargoyle with this retainer gets +1 intercept. When the Gargoyle with this retainer is in combat, the opposing minion takes 1R damage during the initial strike resolution phase of each round, at long or close range.
flavor_text:
But as I approached the window, this... winged rat erupted in a tempest of chittering and flapping, alerting the Tremere and scratching at my back.
Christanius Lionel, Nosferatu antitribu

The action provided by this card is considered to be an action requiring the listed clan/sect/capacity/title (e.g. the action provided by {Open War} is considered an action that requires an Anarch, the action provided by {The Gate of Acheron} is considered an action that requires Hecata). name: Stone Dog

card_text:
Animal with 1 life. Requires a ready Laibon.
Put the Swarm on any ready minion (employing the Swarm is a +1 stealth Ⓓ action if that minion is controlled by another Methuselah). If this action is blocked, put the Swarm on the acting minion instead (no cost is paid). During this minion's unlock phase, if the Swarm has more than 1 life, it burns a life; otherwise, it steals 1 blood or life from this minion. A minion may have only one Swarm.

rulings.text: If the action to employ the Swarm is blocked, the Swarm goes on the acting minion immediately, before combat, if any. [LSJ 20090601]
Is neither a mortal nor a monster. [ANK 20200203-2] [LSJ 20060515]

The option to place the card on another minion can only be used when playing the card normally; for any other action or put into play effect, the card is placed on the playing minion. [LSJ 20090824] [LSJ 20051121]
rulings.group: Retainers and equipment put on different minion

rulings.text: The type of the action (equip/employ) does not change regardless of the target. [ANK 20230408] [LSJ 20050313]
rulings.group: Retainers and equipment put on different minion

rulings.text: If the action is blocked, *all* effects that would be triggered by a successful block (eg. {Banshee Ironwail}) must be applied (ordered by the acting Methuselah).  Other effects and modifiers (eg. {Crypt's Sons}, {Change of Target}) can only be used after all triggered effects have been handled. [ANK 20220116] [ANK 20211207] [ANK 20210627]
